form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Not raced for 39 days. First-up 7th of 10 at Wyong Mid Bm64 on February 10 over 1350m, 11 len behind Piperita with 58.5kg at $14. Second run from a spell second last of 7 at Wyong Cl1 on February 26 over 1350m, slow going 4 len behind Alfred with 58kg at $15. Not going well enough. SCRATCHED.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 4th of 8 at Kembla Grange Mid Cl1 on March 21 over 1000m, slow going 2.25 len behind Fine Wine carrying 55.5kg at $12. The start before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Kembla Grange Prov Cl1 on March 3 over 1000m, on heavy track; nose behind Ride The River with 55kg at $7.50. Big threat dropping back to a country Class 1.

form.formComment: Second run back. Previously second-up second last of 10 at Wyong Prov Mdn on August 31 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Devious Mind carrying 55kg at $81. Has a far tougher task ahead today.
